creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 249670
security/strongswan: Update to 5.9.14

Changelog:

https://github.com/strongswan/strongswan/releases/tag/5.9.14

Port-specific changes:

- No need to patch charon.c, a generalized solution was submitted upstream.
- The DHCP plugin was added (it is disabled by default).

Probably there's no need to patch byteorder.h as well, but I had no way to readily verify it.
